latestIgtvVideos.title: How to Clean Black Stainless Steel Appliances
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Black stainless steel appliances are way easier to clean than regular stainless steel appliances.  We recently purchased a Samsung stove and refrigerator with our kitchen remodel and we love them!!! To clean black stainless steel all you need is a microfiber cloth.  Store-bought stainless steel cleaners are completely unnecessary and a waste of money. 
Simply dampen one corner of the cloth and wipe away greasy fingerprints with the grain of the appliance.  Furthermore, avoid using paper towels, tissues, toilet paper or napkins as these will scratch the finish. ★ WEBSITE ★
https://CleanWithConfidence.com
.
.
.
#cleanwithconfidence #blackstainlesssteel  #samsung #lg #whirlpool #whirlpoolappliances #kitchencleaning #howtoclean #housekeeping #cleaningtips

latestIgtvVideos.title: How To Clean Vinyl Plank Floors
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
How To Clean Vinyl Plank Floors

Luxury vinyl plank floors are great.  They give you the look and feel of hardwood floors without the construction or price!  Most importantly, they are highly durable and easy to clean!

In this video I will detail two different types of cleanings you can use. The first cleaning is a level 1 clean. It's designed for vinyl plank floors with low traffic that just need a quick touch up from time to time. 
The level 2 clean is for those of you who go HARD!!! This cleaning is for vinyl plank floors that are filthy. 
___________________________________ ★ DIY Vinyl Plank Cleaner:★
- 1/2 cup isopropyl alcohol - 1 Cap of Mrs Meyers Concentrated Cleaner
- Fill rest of container with water
___________________________________ ★ WEBSITE ★
CleanWithConfidence.com
.
.
.
#clean #cleaningtips #housekeeping #housekeeper #cleanhome #springcleaning #vinylplankflooring

latestIgtvVideos.title: Top 10 dusting hacks | How to dust your home
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
www.youtube.com/CleanWithConfidence

Dusting! In today's video I share  my top 10 dusting hacks that I have learned over the years from dusting homes, being in dust and just watching people dust who don't know what they're doing. 
My hope is that these tips will help your become a better duster and have a cleaner more breathable home. The tips are in know specific order they're all awesome!!
__________________________________

Top Ten Dusting Hacks: 
1.) Dust your fabric lampshades & furniture with a lint roller.

2.) Use microfiber of a Swiffer Duster.

3.) Dust fake plants with canned air.

4.) Vacuum your returns and air vents with a brush attachment.

5.) Use a flat mop with a microfiber cloth to dust your walls.

6.) Detail your knick knacks with a old makeup brush.

7.) Dust your baseboards without getting on your hands and knees with a Swiffer Duster.

8.) Use a cobweb brush to remove cobwebs. Attach it to an extension pole for high ceilings.

9.) Dust your home fro top to bottom.

10.) Keep your air filter changed out and invest in a good air purifier. ★ SOCIAL MEDIA ★

latestIgtvVideos.title: How to clean a toaster
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
A toaster becomes a fire hazard when not maintained. Dried bread crumbs next to burning hot coils is a recipe for disaster! 
Here is simple step by step tutorial for a clean toaster.

1. Unplug it.
2. Remove crumb trays and clean them in the sink with water and dish soap.
3. Flip the toaster over and shake out any loose crumbs still inside.
4. Clean the coils inside with a cleaning toothbrush.
5. Clean the outside of the toaster with a damp cloth and dish soap.
6. Reassemble and let dry for 24 hours before plugging it back up to use. ********************************************************************
Clean With Confidence Facebook Page: 
www.facebook.com/CleanConfident
.
#CleaningTips #toaster #CleanHouse #home #SpringCleaning #SummerCleaning #WinterCleaning @dawndishwash

latestPosts.caption:
Lint rollers aren’t just for clothes 👇

You can use them to remove dust and pet hair from lampshades, headboards, curtains, and even upholstered chairs. It’s one of the fastest ways to clean fabric surfaces around the house.

#cleaningtips
#cleaninghacks

Why your floors feel sticky after you mop 👇

If your floor feels tacky after mopping, you may be using too much cleaner or the wrong type of cleaner. Residue left behind acts like a magnet for dirt and makes the floor feel sticky.
#cleaningtips
#cleaninghacks
#floorcleaning
#homecleaningtips
#cleanhome
#cleaningmotivation
#cleanwithconfidence

If your oven smells after cleaning, the problem might be cleaner residue left behind inside the oven. That residue burns the next time you cook and creates that strong smell. #cleaningtips
